The 2024 China International Fair for Trade in Services (CIFTIS) was held in Beijing from August 26 to 30. This year's event featured a new exhibition area dedicated to digital trade, highlighting the growing importance of digitalization in the services sector. The fair brought together over 1,500 companies from more than 100 countries and regions, showcasing innovations and trends in various service industries. A series of high-level forums and seminars were organized, focusing on topics such as green development, digital transformation, and international cooperation in services. The event also included a special exhibition on cultural and creative services, emphasizing the integration of culture and technology. CIFTIS continues to serve as a vital platform for promoting global trade in services and fostering international collaboration.
